subject: A robed mage standing with arms raised in an industrial setting, surrounded by multiple red energy spheres and radiating red lightning bolts
description: A humanoid figure stands center-frame with arms spread wide and head tilted back in apparent triumph or exertion. The figure wears dark robes and has a visible red gemstone or energy source at the chest. All around radiate vivid red-white lightning arcs, and three or four large glowing red-orange spheres orbit or float around the figure in an arc. The background suggests an industrial or laboratory setting with cylindrical tanks and pipes visible at the edges, all washed in a cold gray-blue atmospheric haze. The lightning fills the frame edge to edge.
foreground: robed mage with raised arms surrounded by red energy spheres
background: industrial laboratory with tanks and pipes in cold haze
